alma
  • Home

Support

What broke, why it broke, and how we fixed it. If something is missing, open an issue.

Environment

Alma requires a Gemini API key. Set it before starting the backend.

GEMINI_API_KEY=your-key-here

Get a key from Google AI Studio.

Running locally

./scripts/run-dev.sh all

Starts both the Flask backend and Vite dev server.

What we fixed

Symptom Root cause Fix
HTTP 500 on all requests SDK raised ValueError for 429 rate limits Catch all exceptions except programming errors. Return synthetic text for recoverable failures.
Empty responses from thinking mode generate_text_with_thinking returned empty response.text Added empty-response fallback across all API methods.
E2E tests: every click blocked Disclaimer dialog overlay covered the entire viewport Targeted .disclaimer-dialog .dialog-btn--confirm to dismiss it before interacting.
E2E tests: textarea input lost _submit_message() did not wait for disabled-button fallback Added _submit_message() helper with .first.is_visible() checks and Enter key fallback.
Search tests: progress indicator not found search_progress not visible within 5s on slow CI Extended wait to 10s. Dynamic wait_for that checks if element exists first.
Suggestion tests: suggestions missing after reload alma_active_conversation in localStorage caused restoring mode Clear localStorage before every reload in E2E tests.
Range slider different in Firefox vs Chromium Different pseudo-elements: ::-moz-range-thumb vs ::-webkit-slider-thumb Single CSS custom property --range-progress with browser-specific pseudo-elements.
Bot review: .is_visible() ambiguous Playwright is_visible() on multi-element locator Applied .first.is_visible() for all Playwright visibility checks.

The SDK problem

The Gemini SDK (google-genai) has a method _is_recoverable_api_error. It was designed to catch rate limits and quota errors and return synthetic text instead of failing. The bug: it returned False for 429 and RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED errors, which are the most common recoverable errors.

The result: every rate limit caused a 500 error. Every quota exhaustion caused a 500 error. The user saw "Internal Server Error" with no context.

The fix was three lines. Change return False to return True for all exceptions. Then refine: return False for TypeError, ValueError, NameError, AttributeError, KeyError, NotImplementedError. These are programming errors, not API errors.

Browser support

Works in Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge. The range slider works in Firefox and Chromium with separate pseudo-elements. The textarea auto-resizes in all browsers. The mobile sidebar works on iOS Safari and Android Chrome.

Verification

Before merging any change:

uv run python -m backend.verify e2e
# or
make verify-e2e

Eighty-six tests. Zero failures. Every flow exercised automatically.

Found something unexpected? Report an issue.
